release_rule: The package is released only by immutable Git commit SHA or signed archive digest. The release identifier must be inserted into the reviewer declaration without modifying reviewed artifacts.

required_artifact_groups.selection_rule: all USD-W1 scope, fixture, result, proof, and audit artifacts for partial observability, infinite carriers, continuous dynamics, unbounded history, semantic evolution, stochastic reasoning, and actual-process correspondence
all USD-W2 through USD-W6 protocol, result, proof, audit, checker, and test artifacts
all referenced Lean sources, mechanization reports, canonical validators, regression tests, mutation controls, and CI workflow definitions needed to reproduce registered machine checks

completeness_checks: every result identifier resolves to a source artifact
every claimed proof obligation resolves to proof prose or mechanized evidence
every fixture and negative control is included
every cost ledger and equivalence definition is included
every claim boundary and nonclaim is included
all validators and tests referenced by the package are present
the parent POST-USD-EVC-001 registration artifact is included
the release commit has no uncommitted or generated-only evidence
prohibited_omissions: reviewer-facing artifacts that disclose a preferred verdict
nonclaims: the manifest itself proves package completeness
an external reviewer has received the package
